name: Zhytomyr Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the red field of the flag
the cross beneath the coat of arms

description: A red field charged at the centre with the coat of arms of Zhytomyr, set upon a straight yellow cross.
history: Officially adopted on 31 October 2002 by a resolution of the eighth session of the Zhytomyr Oblast Council of the 24th convocation. Zhytomyr Oblast covers the historic Drevlianian and Polissian lands.
